steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend (account 1401234567)
Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty entitles Norwegian resident to 15% WHT rate, not the 13.5% applied
Reference CRA Part XIII tax rates confirming 15% treaty rate for Canada-Norway dividend payments
If custodian disputes, escalate with treaty documentation and demand correction within 30 days

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
